title: Sağlık Bilimleri Dergisi - Hakkımızda
content: İstanbul Esenyurt University Journal of Health Sciences is an open-access electronic peer-reviewed academic journal published three times a year. The journal is published electronically in three issues per year (April, August, December). Although the language of the journal is Turkish, English articles are also accepted. The journal evaluates articles not only from academicians but also from expert researchers. Articles published in the journal are assigned a DOI number.
